title: Lovely
subTitle: Mahadevan does not believe in love and hates the word, but his daughter Nivedha loves Chandru. In order to get his consent, the couple comes up with an intricate plan and executes it.

title: Mannan
subTitle: Krishnan's boss, Shanti, is an autocratic, domineering woman whom he constantly defies. Irked and revengeful, she manipulates his mother who has paralysis and marries him in a bid to control him.

title: Mahanadhi
subTitle: An honest man, Krishnaswamy, is deceived by a chit fund scam and wrongfully imprisoned. Subsequently, as his family falls apart, he endures immense hardships in jail.

title: Bhakthi Neram
subTitle: Bhakthi Neram

title: Indru Poi Naalai Vaa
subTitle: Three friends fall in love with the same woman who moves into the house next door. They try to impress her individually in hilarious ways and leave the decision up to her.

title: Ejamaan
subTitle: Vaanavaryan, the much-loved leader of a village, invites his rival Vallavarayan's wrath when he marries Vaitheeswari, the woman he loves. To take revenge, Vallavarayan resorts to drastic measures.

title: Minsara Kanna
subTitle: Indira hates men and only employs women in her company and personal staff. Kasi enters her life as a driver and soon, one by one, his entire family starts working in the same household.

title: Sathya
subTitle: Sathya, a successful gambler, meets Rosy at a dance bar and sets out on an adventure with her. However, they face several obstacles when a gang of thugs is on the lookout for Rosy.

title: Thambikku Entha Ooru
subTitle: Seeing Balu's spendthrift and carefree attitude, his father sends him to his friend's house in a village to get reformed. Things get complicated when he gets entangled in a love triangle.

title: Thenali
subTitle: Thenali suffers from panophobia and seeks doctor Kailash's help but the latter denies his request. Later, when Kailash goes on a vacation with his family, Thenali joins them and charms his sister.

title: Majaa
subTitle: Aadhi and Mathi, along with their father, go to a village and help a retired officer pay off his debts to a landlord. Soon, Mathi forcibly marries the landlord's daughter to teach him a lesson.

title: Majaa
subTitle: Aadhi and Mathi, along with their father, go to a village and help a retired officer pay off his debts to a landlord. Soon, Mathi forcibly marries the landlord's daughter to teach him a lesson.

title: Neranja Manasu
subTitle: After the villagers of Suriyakudi choose Ayyanar to be their saviour, he puts Sivanandi in jail for killing his father. However, after many years, Sivanandi comes back to take his revenge.

title: Iravu Padagan
subTitle: Iravu Padagan

title: Bhakthi Neram
subTitle: Bhakthi Neram

title: Sigaram
subTitle: A genius music director, Damodaran, sinks into depression when his wife dies and his son, Krishna, becomes an alcoholic due to heartbreak. An old friend, Dr Priya, helps him with all his problems.

title: Punnagai Mannan
subTitle: Sethu and Ranjini are lovers who attempt suicide but Sethu survives and gets sent to prison for a year. Upon his release, he becomes a dance instructor where a student, Malini, falls in love with him.

title: Pasamalar
subTitle: Two siblings, Rajasekharan and Radha, become orphans when they lose their mother at a young age. Things take a turn when Rajasekharan's friend and employee, Anand, falls in love with Radha.

title: Salangai Oli
subTitle: Balakrishna, a trained Kuchipudi dancer, gets an opportunity to compete in a classical dance festival. However, two days prior to his performance, his mother passes away which leaves him devastated.

title: Student No. 1
subTitle: To fulfil his father's dreams, Aditya joins a law college, although his heart yearns to be an engineer. He tries to rehabilitate unruly students, while hiding his dark past.

title: Kadhal Kavithai
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Unnal Mudiyum Thambi
subTitle: A proud Carnatic music maestro wants his younger son, Udaymoorthy, to master the art as his elder son is without speech. However, Udaymoorthy is rather keen on social services.

title: Unnal Mudiyum Thambi
subTitle: A proud Carnatic music maestro wants his younger son, Udaymoorthy, to master the art as his elder son is without speech. However, Udaymoorthy is rather keen on social services.

title: April Maadhathil
subTitle: Kathir, a poor young man, and Shweta, a rich young girl, meet in college and fall in love. However, they are unable to confess their feelings to each other.

title: Rajadhi Raja
subTitle: Raja, a rich estate owner's son, comes back from abroad in order to avenge his dead father. However, things get complicated when he is framed, and he finds his doppelganger in his village.

title: Bhakthi Neram
subTitle: Bhakthi Neram

title: Anandha Ragam
subTitle: A fisherman arranges his sister's marriage to a wealthy man, against her wishes. He later discovers the groom is very sick, but his realisation comes too late to undo the fateful decision.

title: Minsara Kanna
subTitle: Indira hates men and only employs women in her company and personal staff. Kasi enters her life as a driver and soon, one by one, his entire family starts working in the same household.

title: Kalam Vellum
subTitle: Driven by grief, a man kills the landlord responsible for his sister's death. He then runs away and joins a band of outlaws.

title: Pokkiri Raja
subTitle: Ramesh joins a businessman's factory to eradicate irregularity and corruption, but gets dismissed due to personal reasons. Later, he is framed for murder when the industrialist dies.

title: Per Sollum Pillai
subTitle: Rajalakshmi raises Ramu, an orphan, as her own son who in turn always protects his foster family. However, he must stop his malicious foster brothers from marrying off their sister to a gangster.

title: Muthu
subTitle: Muthu serves as a loyal servant to Raja Malayasimman, a rich landlord. However, things between them turn sour when they both fall in love with the same woman.

title: Ethir Kaatru
subTitle: A dubious financial company uses an unemployed youth as a scapegoat to conceal their fraudulent business. However, his suspicious death compels a journalist to expose the firm's deceptive practices.
